## Checklist

<!-- For draft PRs, check the boxes as you complete them. -->

- [ ] PR title matches the PR body.
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated where relevant.
- [ ] Documentation has been added or updated where relevant.
- [ ] Cargo-deny implications have been considered for dependency or license changes.
- [ ] Code has been formatted.
